queries.question: For each report, list the elements it has.
queries.sql: select investigative_reports.report_name , elements.element_value from Investigative_Reports_Elements join Investigative_Reports on Investigative_Reports_Elements.investigative_report_id = Investigative_Reports.id join Elements on Investigative_Reports_Elements.element_id = Elements.element_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?report_name ?element_value WHERE {
  ?investigative_reports_elements a :Investigative_Reports_Elements .
  ?investigative_reports a :Investigative_Reports .
  ?investigative_reports_elements p:hasInvestigative_Reports ?investigative_reports .
  ?elements a :Elements .
  ?investigative_reports_elements p:element_id ?element_id_l .
  ?elements p:element_id ?element_id_r .
  ?investigative_reports p:report_name ?report_name .
  ?elements p:element_value ?element_value .
  FILTER(STR(?element_id_l) = STR(?element_id_r))
}

queries.question: What elements do all reports have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Elements.element_value  from Investigative_Reports_Elements join Investigative_Reports on Investigative_Reports_Elements.investigative_report_id = Investigative_Reports.id join Elements on Investigative_Reports_Elements.element_id = Elements.element_id   GROUP BY Investigative_Reports_Elements.element_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Investigative_Reports_Elements.investigative_report_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Investigative_Reports)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the elements each report has.
